secret_id.description: This must be unique within the project.

replication.type: list(object({auto: list(object({customer_managed_encryption: list(object({kms_key_name: optional(string)}))})), user_managed: list(object({replicas: list(object({location: string, customer_managed_encryption: list(object({kms_key_name: optional(string)}))}))}))}))
replication.description: The replication policy of the secret data attached to the Secret. It cannot be changed after the Secret has been created.
